form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 375m at this track beaten 5 lengths (22.77) behind Skedaddle Timmy in a Maiden on April 12. Placed two back at this track. Missed the frame last time but prior to that had three placings in a row. Deserves another chance.
